headline: Trump 🍊💥 YANKS 5K Troops from Germany 😩🇩🇪 – NATO Cucks PANIC 🚨🤡
text:
Germany's Boris Pistorius 🧔🇩🇪 dropping TEA ☕ on DPA: US pulling 5K GIs 💂‍♂️🚫 from Deutschland was TOTALLY FORESEEABLE 🔮😏, but YO, American boots 🥾 on Euro soil is a WIN-WIN for US & EU bros 🤝💪! NATO thot Allison Hart 👩‍💼📞 SIMPING HARD, 'We're grinding w/ DC 🏛️ to DECODE deets 📜🔍!' Trump 🍊👑 RAGING at Chancellor Friedrich Merz 🕶️🇩🇪 for spilling that US got HUMILIATED 😭🍆 by Iranian neg masters 🧠🇮🇷 in Hormuz Strait drama 🚢⛓️ – no nuke deal, just Ls for Uncle Sam 🇺🇸😢!

Germany hosts the THICCIEST US troop stash in Europe 🗺️🍑 – 36K+ active duty studs 💪 vs Italy's 12K pasta boys 🍝 & UK's 10K tea sippers ☕👑! Trump on Saturday night 🔥: 'We're SLASHING WAY DEEPER than 5K 📉🔪 – HOLD MY Big Mac 🍔!' Eyeing Italy 🇮🇹 & Spain 🇪🇸 pullouts too, shifting to Indo-Pacific glow-up 🌊🐉 like a boss. Last year, Romania got the boot 👢 as part of Trump's 'Europe? Nah, Asia ARC 🏹' pivot!

NATO's 32 simps 🤡😰 freaking: Polish PM Donald Tusk 🧔‍♂️🇵🇱 WARNING 'Transatlantic fam's BIGGEST ENEMY ain't outsiders 👹, it's our ALLIANCE CRUMBLING 🥺💔!' GOP daddies Senator Roger Wicker & Rep Mike Rogers 🗳️🇺🇸 'VERY CONCERNED 😟 by brigade yank – KEEP DETERRENT STRONG in Euro, don't GHOST the continent 👻🌍!' Pistorius preaching: 'Europe STEP UP 🆙 your security game, Berlin's linking arms 🤗 w/ continent crew!'

Germany's NO LONGER DELINQUENT 😤 – Merz squad pumping €105.8BN 💰🔥 into defense by 2027, hitting 3.1% GDP incl Ukraine aid 💸🇺🇦 vs Putin's orc horde 🧌🇷🇺! Trump used to clown 'em for <2% NATO target 📊😂, but now they're OVERACHIEVING like Elon roasting legacy media 🚀🐦! Allison Hart on X 📱: 'Troop pull underscores EU must PUMP MORE 💪 into defense – we saw 5% GDP pledges at Hague summit 🏛️ last year!'

Spat started when Merz roasted students 🎓: 'Yanks got NO STRATEGY 🤦‍♂️, Iranians GHOSTING negs in Islamabad ✈️😆, whole nation HUMILIATED by Tehran tricksters 🧙‍♂️🇮🇷!' Trump Truth Social nuked back 💣📱: 'Merz thinks Iran nuke OK 🤪 – DUMBASSED!' Boom, troop order from Pete Hegseth 🪖 via Pentagon Sean Parnell 🗣️: '6-12 months to GTFO ⏳🚪!' Trump's NATO hater arc MAXED 🔴, blasting allies for skipping Hormuz reopen ops 🚢🔓 after Iran choked the oil vein 💀🛢️ post US-Israel strikes 2/28 💥🇮🇱!

US naval blockade on Iranian Gulf ports 🚢🚫 got 'em salty 🧂😡 – Strait's KEY OIL HIGHWAY 🛣️🛢️ turned chokehold! GOP elders crying 'Bad move king 👑😩!' while Pistorius: 'Deutschland on TRACK 🚂💨!' Trump said 'CUT DEEPER 📉🍆' – is NATO alliance about to get DUMPED like a bad Tinder date 💔📵? Europe simping for more burden 😩📈, Tusk yelling 'REVERSE THE DISASTER 🚨🔄!' Wall Street? Probably shorting transatlantic vibes 📉😂. Stay tuned for more Trump trollage 🍊🤪!
